calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-13-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Teena Paxton.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: David Patel.
No appearance by the Defendants: Theo Smith and Renita Lawrence.
9:30 a.m.- Plaintiff's witness: Robert Strom, was sworn and direct examined.
Exhibit 1- Rental agreement------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice------------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises located at 917 Folsom St., #414, San Francisco.
Lease declared forfeited.
Rent $1,899.62
Attorney's Fees is not requested or awarded.
Costs is waived.
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Continued To Sep-13-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-13-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2004 Off Calendar
